inst.name: T24
inst.short-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.
inst.long-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.

inputport-instance.name: AccountStmt__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: ToGetInterestRate__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: CrossBorderPayment__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: AnualFee__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: MobileBankingFT__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

outputport-instance.name: AccountStmt__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: ToGetInterestRate__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: CrossBorderPayment__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: AnualFee__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: MobileBankingFT__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port

inst.name: GetAcStmt_Res
inst.short-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML
inst.long-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML

resource-properties.resource-property:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountStmtRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ErrorCode"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ErrorMsg"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <ListTxn> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ListTxn/TxnDetail"> <TxnDetail> <DrCr> <xsl:value-of select="./DrCr"></xsl:value-of> </DrCr> <TxnCcy> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnCcy"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCcy> <TxnContent> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string(./TxnContent),string('#'),string('g'),string(' '))"></xsl:value-of> </TxnContent> <LastId> <xsl:value-of select="./LastId"></xsl:value-of> </LastId> <TxnAmount> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnAmount"></xsl:value-of> </TxnAmount> <TxnDate> <xsl:value-of select="java:com.fiorano.xslt.functions.datetime.DateConverter.convertDate_v2('yyyyMMdd','dd MMM yy',./TxnDate)"></xsl:value-of> </TxnDate> <TxnRefNo> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnRefNo"></xsl:value-of> </TxnRefNo> <DrAcctNo> <xsl:value-of select="./DrAcctNo"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctNo> <CrAcctNo> <xsl:value-of select="./CrAcctNo"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctNo> <DrAcctName> <xsl:value-of select="./DrAcctName"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctName> <CrAcctName> <xsl:value-of select="./CrAcctName"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctName> <TxnValDateTime> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnValDateTime"></xsl:value-of> </TxnValDateTime> <TxnTittle> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string(./TxnTittle),string('#'),string('g'),string(' '))"></xsl:value-of> </TxnTittle> <Txntype> <xsl:value-of select="./Txntype"></xsl:value-of> </Txntype> </TxnDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListTxn> </AccountStmtRp> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: ON_EXCEPTION
outputport-instance.description: Used as an Exception Port
